title: Engineer a 'wow factor' no competitor can match
principle: A single spectacle that no other channel in the niche could pull off creates a lasting impression and differentiates the channel, even when it isn't strictly necessary to the story.
rule: Each video should aim for one 'how did they do that' moment scaled to the channel's means (in a motion-graphics channel: an impossible camera move, a data viz at absurd scale, a visual no one else attempts). Differentiation, not just retention, is the goal.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
source.quote: a wow factor ... something no other youtuber can do
